privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on a synthetic pre-existing Ardour project. All dB thresholds precisely match the task description instructions and are explicitly evaluated in the verifier script. The expected snapshot names ('Full_Mix', 'Reduced_Mix', 'Muted_Track') also perfectly match the prompt instructions and the export search patterns.
